summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for a mixed open PR inventory shard. No merge, close, label, comment, or GitHub mutation is planned. The hydrated artifact marks all listed refs non-security-sensitive; merge is blocked for every open PR by missing complete merge preflight, unresolved proof/review-bot state, draft state, or failing checks. No complete executable fix artifact is safe from the compacted evidence, so candidates are classified non-mutatively.
